GoodFellas Barbershop · Dumont, NJ

The Shop

Old School
Craft.
New Edge.

GoodFellas isn't just a barbershop. It's a ritual. From the moment you sit down to the final hot towel — every cut is deliberate, every shave is precise, every client leaves feeling like a new man.

Walk-ins always welcome. Appointments available online. Hogan and the team are ready for you.

What We Do

Our Services

Every service is performed with precision tools, premium products, and the kind of attention to detail that keeps our clients coming back.

— 01
✂️

Haircut

Precision cuts tailored to your face shape and style. From classic taper to modern fade — executed with sharp detail and clean lines every time.

From $30

Most Popular
— 02
🪒

Hot Towel Shave

The full traditional experience. Hot lather, straight razor precision, and a hot towel finish that leaves your skin smooth and refreshed.

From $35

— 03
💈

Straight Razor Shave

Old school, no compromise. A true straight razor shave for the man who values craftsmanship above all else. The closest shave possible.

From $40

— 04
✂️🪒

Cut & Shave Combo

The complete experience in one session. Full haircut followed by a hot towel shave — the ideal combination for a total refresh.

From $60

Best Value
— 05
👶

Kids Cut

Patient, careful, and fun. We take our time with the youngest clients — because looking sharp starts early.

From $20

— 06
🧔

Beard Trim & Shape

Clean lines, sharp edges, defined shape. Whether you want a tight trim or a styled beard — we handle it with precision.

From $20

deserves a great barber.
